news.headline: Agree Realty to announce earnings of $1.03/share on 2024-10-22. Past EPS beats had positive influence on stock price. Trading at $75.58 with 37.18% increase in 52 weeks. Analysts positive about future performance.
news.summary: Agree Realty (NYSE:ADC) is set to announce its quarterly earnings with an estimated earnings per share (EPS) of $1.03. The company previously beat expectations by $0.01 in the last quarter, resulting in a 1.74% increase in share price the next day. Agree Realty has received 10 ratings from analysts, with market sentiments suggesting bullish outlook for long-term shareholders. Investors are advised to keep an eye on the earnings release for potential impact on the company's stock price.

Analysts predict earnings of 46 cents per share, a rise from 38 cents per share in the same quarter last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be $456.9 million, up from $427.28 million in the previous year. Following a second-quarter revenue miss and a lowered FY24 outlook on July 18, Hexcel's stock price closed at $62.72, marking a 0.8% increase on Friday. news.headline: AuditBoard appoints former audit executive and CIO Justin Greenberger as Chief Customer Officer at the 2024 Audit & Beyond Conference.
news.summary: During the 2024 Audit & Beyond Conference in Las Vegas, AuditBoard revealed that Justin Greenberger has been appointed as Chief Customer Officer to enhance customer experiences during the company's rapid expansion. With his background in customer success and audit, Greenberger's role is crucial in maintaining exceptional service standards. This move comes as AuditBoard continues to grow globally and solidify its position as a leader in cloud-based audit, risk, ESG, and InfoSec management. Prior to this, Greenberger held the position of Chief Information Officer at GE Di.

news.headline: AI and trust will reshape healthcare by 2035 according to HSBC report unveiled at HLTH USA 2024, focusing on reinventing interactions and resolving silos.
news.summary: In New York, a report titled Health 2035: A Bold Path Through the Uncharted Future of Health was released by HSBC Innovation Banking and The Linus Group at HLTH USA 2024 in Las Vegas. The report emphasizes the importance of enhancing trust between physicians and patients, redefining in-person interactions, and introducing new solutions to tackle existing silos and incentives in healthcare. The aim is to drive meaningful change in the industry towards the future. This initiative highlights the significance of collaboration and innovation in addressing healthcare challenges.

news.headline: Cruise Planners debuts marketing initiatives at annual convention to inspire travel, boosting industry growth. #TravelInspiration #InnovativeMarketing.
news.summary: In Coral Springs, Florida on October 21, 2024, Cruise Planners, the largest network of home-based travel agency franchises in the country, revealed new marketing strategies at its yearly convention. These initiatives aim to ignite new travel ideas and excitement among customers.

news.headline: VISIT FLORIDA and Emergent Media win 2024 ESTO Award for Best Video Series, recognition in destination marketing.
news.summary: A prestigious award from the U.S. Travel Association acknowledges high-quality destination marketing efforts. The award was given to Emergent Media's acclaimed video series, "Florida's Table," created in collaboration with VISIT FLORIDA. This original series was recognized with a Mercury Award for Best Video. The announcement was made in El Segundo, California on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: Carnegie Mellon University's Heinz College introduces new AI Systems Management program, top-rated in the US.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on October 21, 2024, Carnegie Mellon University unveiled its latest educational offering, the Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence Systems Management (AIM) program. Touted as the top institution in the U.S. for AI education, Carnegie Mellon will host this program under its renowned Heinz College.

Morgan Asset Management unveiled the 2025 Long-Term Capital Market Assumptions (LTCMAs), offering insights into the expected returns and risks in various asset classes over the next 10-15 years. news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 21, 2024, the U.S. Pharmacopeia (USP) revealed its acquisition of Stratix Labs, a Saint Paul, MN-based microbiology technology firm. This acquisition aims to enhance USP's existing microbiology portfolio and incorporate new contamination control tactics. The move signifies a strategic step towards expanding their product range and strengthening their position in the industry.

news.headline: Sony Teams with Cloud9 to Provide High-Tech Monitors for Call of Duty Team in New York, boosting performance.
news.summary: Sony Electronics Inc. revealed on October 21, 2024, their partnership with Cloud9, a top esports organization. They will serve as the monitor supplier for Cloud9 New York's elite Call of Duty team. Sony will provide the team with cutting-edge monitors for their gaming setups.

Shareholders of record on Nov... will receive this dividend, which is scheduled to be paid out on November 27, 2024.

news.headline: LYT introduces Route Prediction™ to its LYT.emergency platform, optimizing green lights for first responders.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on October 21, 2024, LYT unveiled a new feature on their emergency platform called Route Prediction™. This addition utilizes cutting-edge AI technology to forecast and enhance the synchronization of traffic signals for emergency vehicles navigating their way to emergencies. By optimizing green lights along the entire route, this tool aims to improve response times and efficiency for emergency services. LYT is recognized as a pioneer in NextGen intelligent solutions.

news.headline: Grove Collaborative partners with Crescent Hotels & Resorts to create eco-friendly "Beyond Plastic™ Stay" for travelers.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from San Francisco, Grove revealed their collaboration with Crescent Hotels & Resorts to introduce the "Beyond Plastic™ Stay" initiative. This partnership aims to cater to environmentally conscious travelers by offering sustainable alternatives and reducing plastic waste in the hospitality industry. The initiative, marked by the use of eco-friendly products, emphasizes Grove's commitment to promoting responsible travel practices. This strategic alliance highlights the importance of sustainable tourism and addresses the growing demand for eco-conscious options among consumers.

news.headline: Indri's Diwali Collector’s Edition 2024 wins Gold at Whiskies of the World Awards, continuing its winning streak.
news.summary: In New Delhi, the Indri Diwali Collector’s Edition 2024 has achieved a Gold award at the prestigious Whiskies of the World Awards 2024. This success adds to its impressive record of victories, solidifying its reputation as a top contender.

news.headline: Retailers are embracing holidays year-round as consumers extend festive spirit. New data from Faire shows early holiday prep increasing.
news.summary: In San Francisco, there is a noticeable shift in consumer behavior extending the holiday season far beyond December. The trend of "Christmas in July" and the increasing practice of decorating early as November indicate a prolonged festive period. Retailers are adapting to this change by starting holiday planning throughout the year to stay competitive during the busy shopping season. Insights from Faire reveal that the holiday season dynamics have shifted, showcasing a lasting impact with more early festive preparations and shopping.

news.headline: Online Pharmacy Market expected to reach USD 286.26 Billion by 2029, from USD 109.74 Billion in 2023, with a CAGR of 17.33%. Features data on 60 vendors.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Online Pharmacy Market - Focused Insights 2024-2029" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Online Pharmacy Market had a value of USD 109.74 Billion in 2023, with a projected increase to USD 286.26 Billion by 2029, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 17.33%. The global online pharmacy market report covers insights on 60 vendors. It is noted that the market is fragmented, with a few leading companies holding substantial control. Despite this, there are lucrative growth prospects in the industry.

news.headline: Tips to maintain immune health during cold and flu season. Prevention is key. Stay healthy!
news.summary: In October 21, 2024, in Mission, Kansas, it was reported that cold and flu season has arrived. The key to combatting this season is to focus on prevention. Although avoiding all germs entirely is unrealistic, taking steps to minimize exposure can make a big difference in staying healthy. This includes practicing good hygiene, staying home when sick, and getting vaccinated. These measures can help reduce the spread of illnesses and prevent complications. Stay informed on the latest health guidelines and prioritize your health during this time when __ people are at a higher risk of getting sick. Remember to wash your hands regularly, cover your coughs and sneezes, and maintain a healthy lifestyle to boost your immune system. By taking these precautions, you can decrease the chances of falling ill during this cold and flu season.

news.headline: Activists on Wall Street targeting easy wins.
FU Associates Ltd. is rebranding as Inclined, a data expert firm since 1981.
news.summary: Inclined, a reputable company that has been a trusted partner in the public sector since 1981, has announced a rebrand from FU Associates, Ltd. The rebrand was revealed on Oct. 21, 2024, in Arlington, Virginia. This move signifies Inclined's dedication to adapting to the data-rich modern world and expanding its expertise. With over 40 years of experience, Inclined is looking to bring forth a new identity while continuing to serve their clients in the public sector.

news.headline: LUMIBIRD reports Q3 revenue results, signs deal to acquire Continuum product range from Amplitude Laser Group. #business #acquisition

Stock indices rose for six consecutive weeks, with Dow up 0.96%, S&P 500 by 0.85%, Nasdaq by 0.80%. Retail sales exceeded expectations in Sept, jobless claims decreased. Housing market impacted by rising Treasury yields, leading to drop in mortgage applications. Apple's iPhone 16 boosted sales.
news.summary: Last week, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 saw their longest winning streak of six weeks, with the Dow rising by 0.96%, S&P 500 increasing by 0.85%, and Nasdaq advancing by 0.80%. Retail sales in September surpassed expectations, while a notable drop in jobless claims indicated a strong U.S. economy. Analysts are reevaluating the likelihood of further interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve due to this economic momentum. However, rising Treasury yields have led to a spike in mortgage rates, leading to a sharp decline in mortgage applications and homebuyer demand. Benzinga highlighted Apple's strong performance with the iPhone 16 driving record sales in Q3.

news.headline: Subsea 7 S.A. informed of major shareholder transactions, details in attached forms. Compliance with EU Market Abuse Reg. & Norwegian Sec. Trading Act.
news.summary: Subsea 7 S.A. has been informed about share transactions conducted by a significant shareholder. Specifics of these transactions can be found in the provided documentation. This disclosure adheres to the EU Market Abuse Regulation and is in compliance with the disclosure obligations outlined in Section 5-12 of the Norwegian Securities Trading Act.

news.summary: In Brentwood, Tennessee, Surgery Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGRY), a prominent owner and operator of short-stay surgical facilities, will be disclosing its third quarter 2024 financial outcomes on Tuesday, November 12, 2024. The results will be released before the market opens, accompanied by a conference call set for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Surgery Partners is a key player in the industry and this update is highly anticipated by investors and analysts alike. Stay tuned for the specific numbers and insights that will be shared during the call.

news.headline: Alcoholic beverages market to reach USD 3.1 trillion by 2032 with 6.8% CAGR growth, driven by immersive experiences and cannabis integration. Beer leads product sales, glass bottles remain popular, online retailers dominate sales. Trend towards premium beverages, low-alcohol options, and craft products.
news.summary: The global alcoholic beverages market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.8% from 2024 to 2032, with overall sales revenue estimated to reach US$ 3.1 trillion by the end of 2032. Companies are enhancing consumer experiences through events, tastings, and interactive activations to build brand loyalty. The integration of cannabis extracts into beverages is a new opportunity, thanks to legalization in many regions. Beer leads in product type segment, glass bottles dominate for their recyclability and premium image, and online retailers are the primary sales channel. Rising demand for premium beverages, interest in low-alcohol options, and the popularity of craft beer and spirits are driving growth in the market.

news.headline: Ayre Group and Nikki Beach Hospitality to open Nikki Beach Resort & Spa Antigua in partnership, including a beach club.
news.summary: Today in Jolly Beach, Antigua, the Ayre Group and Nikki Beach Hospitality Group revealed their collaboration to launch Nikki Beach Resort & Spa Antigua. The resort, set to include Nikki Beach Antigua beach club, marks an exciting venture for the global luxury lifestyle hospitality company. The partnership aims to create a luxurious experience for visitors, showcasing the beauty of Antigua's coastline.

news.headline: Evergy plans to build two 705 MW natural gas plants in Kansas by 2030 to increase energy efficiency.
news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri, Evergy has announced plans to invest in the construction of two new combined-cycle natural gas plants. Each plant will have a capacity of 705 MW, and they are scheduled to commence operations in 2029 and 2030. This strategic investment underscores Evergy's commitment to enhancing its power generation capabilities in the region.

news.headline: Global AI Infrastructure Investment Partnership (GAIIP) launches $100 billion AI Data Center Initiative.
news.summary: A new report titled "Will The Data Center Gold Rush Come To An End?" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. This report delves into the current state of data center demand and the impact of generative AI in driving increased investments, specifically within the webscale industry. Generative AI, known as GenAI, is garnering significant interest among investors, with many viewing it as a unique opportunity. Early indicators suggest that GenAI could be a game-changer, prompting a surge in investments in the data center sector.

news.headline: OutSystems named a Leader for 8th year in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Low-Code Platforms, positioned furthest right with 13 vendors.
news.summary: OutSystems, a prominent player in software innovation, has recently been acknowledged as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise Low-Code Application Platforms. For the eighth year running, OutSystems secured a position as a Leader, surpassing thirteen other vendors, with the highest ranking for Completeness of Vision. This recognition underscores OutSystems' dedication to assisting companies in digital transformation.

news.headline: Valneva to present data on chikungunya vaccine IXCHIQ® at top scientific conferences in Q4 2024.
news.summary: In Saint-Herblain, France, on October 21, 2024, Valneva SE, a specialty vaccine company listed on Nasdaq (VALN) and Euronext Paris (VLA), shared that its senior leadership will showcase data on the sole approved chikungunya vaccine, IXCHIQ®, at key scientific conferences in Q4 2024.

This significant project was obtained via a Quadient business affiliate, showcasing the company’s dedication to nurturing lasting client connections and building key alliances to cater to customers effectively and expand reach to new enterprises seeking automation solutions.

news.headline: Bullfrog AI closed offering & private placement for $3.13M. Sold 1,565,000 shares at $2 each, with warrants.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on October 21, 2024, BullFrog AI Holdings, Inc. announced the completion of a definitive agreement for the purchase of 1,565,000 shares of common stock in a registered direct offering. Additionally, common warrants to acquire up to 1,565,000 shares were issued in a private placement. The combined purchase price for these transactions was set at $2.00 per share. The warrants, with an exercise price of $2.00 per share, can be exercised six months from the issuance date and will expire five years from the initial exercise date. BullFrog AI specializes in technology-driven drug development using AI and machine learning techniques to facilitate successful pharmaceutical and biologics development.
